title: Electrical Engineer
description: We are looking for a motivated Electrical Engineer to join our manufacturing team. You will be responsible for design, testing, and quality assurance of our conductor and cable products.
responsibilities: Design and review electrical drawings and schematics
Conduct quality checks on conductors and cables
Coordinate with production and R&D teams
requirements: 2–5 years of experience in a manufacturing environment
Proficiency in AutoCAD and MS Office
Knowledge of IS/IEC standards for conductors and cables

title: Sales Executive
description: We are hiring a Sales Executive to expand our customer base across power utilities, EPC contractors, and distribution companies.
responsibilities: Identify and develop new business opportunities
Manage and grow existing customer accounts
Prepare proposals, quotations, and follow up on enquiries
Represent Urjatech at industry events and tender submissions
requirements: Bachelor's degree in any discipline (technical preferred)
1–3 years of B2B sales experience, preferably in electrical / power sector
Willingness to travel within the assigned territory

title: Production Supervisor
description: Seeking an experienced Production Supervisor to oversee day-to-day manufacturing operations for our conductor and cable lines.
responsibilities: Supervise and coordinate production shift operations
Monitor output, quality, and equipment utilisation
Ensure adherence to safety and quality standards
Train and guide shop-floor team members
requirements: Diploma / B.Tech in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering
3–7 years of experience in wire/cable or similar manufacturing
Strong knowledge of production planning and quality control
Ability to lead a team of 15–25 workers
